tasks.label: git pull on folder open
tasks.command: git config pull.rebase true; git config rebase.autoStash true; git pull

tasks.label: assert-yaml-recipe
tasks.command: case "${fileExtname}" in .yaml|.yml|.recipe|.plist) exit 0 ;; *) echo 'Active file is not an AutoPkg recipe (.yaml/.yml/.recipe/.plist)'; exit 1 ;; esac

windows.command: if ('${fileExtname}' -in '.yaml','.yml','.recipe','.plist') { exit 0 } else { Write-Output 'Active file is not an AutoPkg recipe (.yaml/.yml/.recipe/.plist)'; exit 1 }
